name: RedEx
short_description: RedEx is a 2D shooter with Tower Defence mechanics, with a minimalist pixel art stile. You are to fight against mercenaries of underground smuggling organization which pretends to be a logistic corporation called RedExpress.
detailed_description:
Get ready for adventure playing as a brave saboteur who is eager to wreak havoc on the RedExpress logistics corporation. Fight the mercenaries of this filthy underground business, deciding the fate of RedEx forever.

Features:
• Tower Defense mechanics — no one restricts you in filling the field with turrets or dummies. The game is just a playground for your imagination. Look for the best tactics, fill the field not only with red bodies, but also with your technique!
• A varied arsenal, ranging from simple pistols to powerful calibers.
• A selection of unique characters that will radically change the style of your gameplay.
• Nice visual component and style of the game.
• Many different enemies with an even wider variety of weapons.
• Location bosses you'll hate!
• Upgrade your character, making it even stronger!
• And much more...
